response.justification: Bogdan is technically overqualified for this junior/mid-level role, with Staff Engineer experience and 15+ years across the full stack. While his TypeScript, React, Node.js, and clean architecture skills perfectly exceed all requirements, the significant seniority mismatch presents a major retention risk. He would likely become bored with entry-level work, creating a lose-lose situation unless this is an intentional career pivot or lifestyle change.
strengths: Deep expertise in required stack: TypeScript, Node.js/Nest.js, React, PostgreSQL, and AWS
Proven architecture discipline with TDD and software craftsmanship background across 15+ years
Full-stack capability—has built platforms from database to UI across multiple domains and scales
concerns: Severely overqualified: Staff Engineer for entry/mid-level role risks quick departure once initial tasks plateau
Salary expectations likely misaligned—staff-level compensation vs. junior/mid-level budget
No energy/construction domain experience, though strong learning ability mitigates this
